projects.recommendation: Transition the platform to the data engineering BAU team with a structured handover.

projects.recommendation: Proceed to the next phase of control implementation; evidence gathering is on track.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for a 3-month internal beta with 50 users. Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of GBP 150,000 released for pilot phase.
